settings.title: More good years with your dog. That's what this is really about.
settings.subtitle: Every Nuumipet product is built around one goal — helping your dog live a longer, calmer, healthier life.

settings.title: MENTAL WELLNESS
settings.description: Nuumipet's calming and behavior products are designed to bring the baseline stress down so your dog can be more balanced, more settled, and healthier over time.

settings.title: PHYSICAL WELLNESS
settings.description: A dog's gut health affects everything — energy, stress resilience, immune function, how they age. Nuumipet's physical wellness formulas support all of it from the inside.

settings.title: NATURAL INGREDIENTS, ALWAYS
settings.description: Every formula is made with natural ingredients and nothing else. No fillers padding out the label, no proprietary blends hiding what's actually in there. You can read exactly what your dog is getting — and why it's there.

settings.title: Three pillars. One direction.
settings.description: Everything in the Nuumipet lineup is built around mental wellness, physical wellness, and ingredient transparency — because longevity doesn't come from one product. It comes from covering the whole dog.

settings.title: EnerCanis Gut Health Supplement
settings.benefit: Daily digestive support with a clearer ingredient story.
settings.summary: Liquid L-Glutamine, Hydrolyzed Collagen, and prebiotic support designed to help soothe the gut, support the intestinal barrier, and fit easily into a daily routine.

settings.title: ByeBark Ultrasonic Device
settings.benefit: Fast interruption for frantic barking without harm.
settings.summary: A smart ultrasonic training tool made to break barking loops quickly, from fence fighting to door-trigger barking, while varying the pattern so dogs do not tune it out.

settings.benefit: A broader bundle for households that want support across multiple daily needs.
settings.summary: Lead with the problem it helps solve, what kind of support it offers, and why it feels easier to trust than a generic wellness product.

settings.heading: Three smart starting points, depending on what your dog needs first.
settings.description: Choose the product that matches the clearest need right now — calming, gut health, or a broader training-and-wellness bundle — without having to decode the whole store first.

settings.title: Specific jobs
settings.text: The lineup is built around real needs like gut health, calming support, bark control, and ear cleaning.

settings.title: Measured claims
settings.text: The homepage stays grounded in what each product is actually designed to do instead of promising everything at once.

settings.title: Specific jobs
settings.text: The lineup is built around real needs like gut health, calming support, bark control, and ear cleaning.

settings.title: Routine friendly
settings.text: Each essential is positioned to feel realistic for everyday use, whether it is a supplement, collar, device, wipe, or bundle.

settings.heading: We turn down more product ideas than we greenlight.
settings.quote: If it doesn't move the needle on how long and how well your dog lives, it doesn't get made.
settings.name: The filter behind every product
settings.role: Why the lineup stays small on purpose
settings.body: Most pet brands build a catalog first and figure out the mission later. We did the opposite. Longevity is the filter — and if a product idea doesn't pass it, we don't make it.

settings.label: Digestion, energy, and immunity from the inside.
Lower the baseline stress wearing your dog down over time.
Tools to understand your dog and make daily life easier together.
Mind and body support so the good years last longer.

settings.heading: What each category is built to do.
settings.body: Four categories. Each one handles a different piece of your dog's long-term health — so you can start where the need is clearest and build from there.

settings.title: CalmiCollar works on the stress running underneath everything else.
settings.text: Pheromone technology lowers the baseline anxiety that makes dogs reactive, restless, and hard to reach.

settings.custom_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 64 64' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M25.5 22.5c5.5 0 10 4.5 10 10s-4.5 10-10 10-10-4.5-10-10 4.5-10 10-10Z' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.8'/><path d='M38.5 21.5c5.8 0 10.5 4.7 10.5 10.5S44.3 42.5 38.5 42.5 28 37.8 28 32 32.7 21.5 38.5 21.5Z' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.8' opacity='.54'/><path d='M23.5 32h17' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.8' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M38.5 26.5v11' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.8' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='.78'/></svg>
settings.title: Training is about how you and your dog learn to read each other.
settings.text: Nuumipet's training tools give you practical methods for the moments that matter most: walks, reactivity, daily routines. Your dog stops guessing. So do you. And a dog that genuinely understands you is calmer, safer, and easier to keep healthy long-term.

settings.title: EnerCanis handles what calming alone can't touch.
settings.text: Gut health and stress are more connected in dogs than most owners realize — when digestion is off, anxiety gets worse, energy drops, and the body wears down faster. EnerCanis supports the internal system that keeps everything else running.

settings.heading: One product helps. The right combination changes the trajectory.
settings.description: Each Nuumipet product handles a different piece of your dog's daily health. Here's how they connect — and why most owners end up using more than one.

settings.question: Which product should I start with?
settings.answer: Start with whatever's making your dog's life hardest right now. Anxiety or reactivity — start with CalmiCollar. Digestion, low energy, gut problems — start with EnerCanis.

settings.question: Can I use more than one product at the same time?
settings.answer: Yes — and most owners end up doing exactly that. CalmiCollar handles the stress running underneath while the training tools work on the specific behaviors you're seeing day to day. EnerCanis can run alongside either of them since it's working on a completely different system. They're designed to cover different jobs, so there's no conflict.

settings.question: How quickly will I see results?
settings.answer: Depends on the product. CalmiCollar typically shows changes within the first few days. EnerCanis works on gut health, so most owners notice a shift in energy and digestion within 2-3 weeks. Training tools depend on consistency — but owners who follow the methods usually see progress in the first week.

settings.question: What if it doesn't work for my dog?
settings.answer: Every Nuumipet product comes with a money-back guarantee. If you don't see results, reach out and we'll take care of it. We'd rather you try it knowing the risk is on us than wonder whether it could have helped.

settings.question: Are the ingredients safe for all breeds and ages?
settings.answer: Yes. Every formula uses natural ingredients that are safe across breeds and life stages. But if your dog has a specific medical condition or is on medication, it’s always recommended to check with your vet first.

settings.heading: Real questions, straight answers.
settings.description: What each product does, how they work together, and what happens if you're not happy — answered before you check out.
